overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating an industrial district with massive overhead pipes and metal structures. The player encounters and engages hostile NPCs in combat while moving from ground level to elevated walkways near a Petrochem facility at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level industrial walkway beneath overhead pipe network

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial ground level pathway beneath large overhead pipes and metal structures

notable_agents.action: distant figure in dark clothing walking ahead along the industrial path

entered.detail: massive network of large industrial pipes running overhead through the scene
thick concrete and metal pillars supporting the overhead industrial structures
elevated metal walkway bridge crossing above the ground path
tall metal poles with bright floodlights illuminating the area
metal chain link fencing running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a ground-level industrial corridor beneath massive overhead pipes and metal support pillars. The area is dimly lit with artificial floodlights mixed with fading natural dusk light. A distant NPC is visible walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ground level corridor with yellow safety markings

events.description: NPC turns to face player and engages in close combat
player fires handgun and NPC collapses to the ground

agents.ego_description: following the NPC ahead, then engaging in close-quarters combat and neutralizing the threat

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC in black trenchcoat who turns and attacks the player before being shot and falling

entered.detail: yellow safety markings painted on the asphalt ground surface
metal staircase structure leading to upper industrial levels

segments.scene_description: The player follows the NPC through the industrial corridor marked with yellow safety lines. The NPC turns hostile around 20 seconds, engaging in combat before being shot by the player and collapsing near the metal stairs leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with solar panel arrays

events.description: player ascends metal stairs from ground level to upper walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs to reach the elevated industrial walkway while passing the fallen NPC

entered.detail: safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway
large industrial equipment and machinery housings
massive industrial building with illuminated PETROCHEM signage visible in the distance
arrays of blue solar panels installed on the upper platform surfaces
stacked metal storage crates and containers
red and yellow industrial barrels and drums

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the metal stairs to an elevated industrial walkway, revealing a wider view of the facility including the distant Petrochem building and solar panel arrays. The ground level with the fallen NPC is left behind as the player moves onto the upper platform with metal crates and industrial barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform with machinery and storage containers

events.description: player encounters second hostile NPC and engages in gunfire
NPC in blue jacket is shot and falls against metal crates

agents.ego_description: moving along elevated walkway, engaging and neutralizing a second hostile NPC near storage crates

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC in blue jacket standing near crates who engages the player and is shot

entered.detail: full view of the massive dark industrial Petrochem facility dominating the background
yellow painted safety railings along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Moving along the elevated walkway, the player encounters a second hostile NPC near metal crates and engages in combat, neutralizing the threat. The massive Petrochem building looms in the background while the player navigates past industrial barrels and machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level industrial maintenance area with storage barrels

agents.ego_description: navigating the upper industrial level, turning corners and moving past storage containers and machinery

entered.detail: large concrete industrial structures and barriers
large metal shipping containers and storage units

segments.scene_description: The player continues exploring the upper industrial maintenance area, turning past concrete structures and industrial containers. The area features persistent overhead pipe networks and scattered storage barrels as the player moves deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a dimly lit ground-level industrial corridor up into an expansive elevated maintenance area at dusk. It begins beneath massive overhead pipes and metal pillars, following a distant figure through a corridor marked with yellow safety lines until a sudden hostile encounter ends with the NPC collapsing near a set of stairs. As the camera ascends these metal stairs, the perspective shifts from the enclosed ground level to a wide industrial walkway, revealing a distant Petrochem building and solar panel arrays. The scene then moves across the upper platform past metal crates and barrels, where a second combat engagement occurs against the backdrop of the looming facility. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the maintenance zone, turning past concrete structures and industrial containers while remaining beneath a persistent network of overhead pipes.
